channel.title: personal on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in personal on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: Why I started programming
item.description: I’ve been interviewing a lot lately since I was let go from my last gig.

item.title: What I do
item.description: In response to being tagged by Ben Scheirman: I’m a full-time software developer currently working for Wachovia (formerly World Savings) in San Antonio, TX.
